text:
— 

LONG NAME: CCW_PRSCRBR_ID 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: PDE and HCIdea™ Prescriber Database (derived) 

VALUES: Null, or any positive or negative number 

COMMENT: This variable is only available 2006–2013. Beginning with 2014 data, the National Provider Identifier 
(NPI; which appears in the PDE variable called PRSCRBR_ID) is used in place of the CCW_PRSCRBR_ID 
within the Prescriber Characteristics file. 

Researchers who received CCW data from 2006–2013 and wish to identify the
